changeSet.author: entitlement-module
changeSet.sql:
-- List Names table (master) CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.list_names ( id UUID NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NULL, is_active BOOLEAN NULL DEFAULT true, created_by UUID NULL, updated_by UUID NULL, created_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, is_statistics BOOLEAN NULL, CONSTRAINT list_names_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT list_names_name_key UNIQUE (name) );
-- List Values table (detail) CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.list_values ( id UUID NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NULL, list_names_id UUID NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN NULL DEFAULT true, created_by UUID NULL, updated_by UUID NULL, created_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(50) NULL, CONSTRAINT list_values_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT fk_list_names FOREIGN KEY (list_names_id) REFERENCES public.list_names(id) );
